revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:OSM Location map]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
1 revision imported
fix missing pipe in 22
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia7]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia7]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Trimmed off cruft from entries in [[:Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]]
1 revision imported: fixing my error
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:OSM_Location_map]]
blanking page since this really works badly on many pages
Adding [[Category:mass bump]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:1 revision imported]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Removing from [[Category:1 revision imported]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:11]]" to ""
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23520214635|time triggered pipeline]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24296132115|time triggered pipeline]]
